en.title: My Products
en.now_ios_desc: Capture ideas by sending messages. Build conversations, collaborate with others, and stay in sync with Now · macOS through iCloud.
en.now_mac_desc: A native macOS workspace for deeper writing and organization. Works with Now · iOS and keeps your conversations synced via iCloud.
en.today_desc: Today is an app focused on building good habits with a clean interface.
en.recordbox_desc: A multifunctional recording app for managing life's details: bookkeeping, moments, password manager, notes (Markdown), all in one box. Designed for simplicity, privacy, and efficiency.

zh.title: 我的产品
zh.now_ios_desc: 用发送消息的方式记录想法，创建会话整理内容，与他人协作，并通过 iCloud 与 Now · macOS 双向同步。
zh.now_mac_desc: 面向桌面场景的原生 macOS 版本，适合深度整理与持续写作，并与 Now · iOS 保持 iCloud 实时联动。
zh.today_desc: Today 是一款帮助用户建立良好习惯的应用，界面简洁直观，规划今日习惯。
zh.recordbox_desc: 多功能记录App，笔记(支持Markdown)、记账、记时光、密码备忘四大场景，极简设计蕴含强大功能。
